creator: gspurki@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #1)

>Running FreeBSD Version?

13.1-RELEASE-p5

>Running PHP version?

Have you read the title and bugreport? 80 aka 8.0

>Ports or package? How did you upgrade?

portmaster -ad + git HEAD

>The errors are more or less of a broken ports tree.

No it's not, it's that php80 or better the intl.so extension still wants the old version of ICU...more or less.
